case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. ARLEY RODRIGO CONTRERAS TRUJEQUE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ROSARIO DEL PILAR. DEFENDANT ARLEY RODRIGO CONTRERAS TRUJEQUE IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRERAS TRUJEQUE, ARLEY RODRIGO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS TRUJEQUE, ARLEY RODRIGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED JUN-15-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS TRUJEQUE, ARLEY RODRIGO
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JPT FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
